MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-29-2009 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. PARTIES WERE ASKED TO MEET AND CONFER IN THE HALLWAY AND MAKE A PHONE CALL TO ATTY. WAITE REGARDING STIPULATING TO A TRIAL DATE. THE MATTER WAS RECALLED AND PARTIES AGREED TO SET THE TRIAL ON NOVEMBER 16, 2009. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/11/09 IS CONTINUED TO 11/16/09 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED EXCEPT FOR EXPERT DISCOVERY. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE AND PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)
